assertions.description: TrustedTypePolicyFactory is exposed via window.trustedTypes, the surface CSP script-src builds on for typed sinks.
SecurityPolicyViolationEvent is exposed, used to observe blocked scripts in the page.
HTMLMetaElement.httpEquiv reflects the http-equiv attribute used for inline CSP, which carries script-src directives.
crypto.subtle.digest is available; CSP script-src hashes are derived from SHA-256/384/512 of inline scripts.
Without an active CSP, eval is callable; script-src-v2 introduces a hash-based mechanism specifically to control eval-like contents.
ReportingObserver exists so CSP reports (the channel script-src violations flow through) can be observed.
